job_id.description: Identifier for the anomaly detection job.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of a single bucket result. If you do not specify this parameter, the API returns information about all buckets.

from.description: Skips the specified number of buckets.

size.description: Specifies the maximum number of buckets to obtain.

anomaly_score.description: Refer to the description for the `anomaly_score` query parameter.

desc.description: Refer to the description for the `desc` query parameter.

end.description: Refer to the description for the `end` query parameter.

exclude_interim.description: Refer to the description for the `exclude_interim` query parameter.

expand.description: Refer to the description for the `expand` query parameter.

sort.description: Refer to the desription for the `sort` query parameter.

start.description: Refer to the description for the `start` query parameter.

from.description: Skips the specified number of items.

size.description: Specifies the maximum number of items to obtain.
